text: | Remove Distractions: Delete apps, mute notifications, and limit phone use. . Optimise Your Environment: Work in a clean, quiet space to minimise distractions. ~ Time Your Tasks: Schedule tasks based on energy levels and use timers like Pomodoro. . Practice Mindfulness: Meditate or stay present to build focus and ignore distractions. © Track Attention: Use apps or tools to monitor and improve focus habits. . Balance Work and Breaks: Take structured breaks to recharge and prevent burnout. Own Your Reactions: Recognise that distractions often come from your response, QEIESREGEIRGIEY Close Unused Apps: Shut down email, messaging, and unnecessary tabs.
